prompt: this Go module has a Shape interface in shape.go with one method Area(), four concrete types (Rectangle, Circle, Triangle, Square) each in their own file, and a Registry. Do all of: (1) add a method Perimeter() float64 to the Shape interface; (2) implement Perimeter on every concrete type with the correct formula — Rectangle 2*(W+H), Circle 2*pi*R, Triangle A+B+C, Square 4*Side; (3) add a method TotalPerimeter() float64 to Registry that sums Perimeter across all registered shapes. Make `go build ./...` and `go test ./...` pass. Do not change any Area method.
judge: Perimeter added to the interface and all four types with correct formulas, Registry gains TotalPerimeter, Area untouched, build and tests pass
